wizard_steps_tested.name: Foto Intraoral
wizard_steps_tested.notes: Photo upload via file input works. Image preview shows with quality assessment. Anamnesis text field accepts input. Voice recording button present. Additional photo slots (45, face, radiograph) visible. Two flow options: Analise Completa (3 credits) and Analise Rapida (1 credit).

wizard_steps_tested.name: Preferencias
wizard_steps_tested.notes: Whitening level radio buttons (Natural/Diamond) work correctly. Default is Branco Natural (B1/A1, 0 extra). Diamond adds +1 credit. Credit cost displayed clearly. Continuar button works.

wizard_steps_tested.name: Analise AI
wizard_steps_tested.notes: Progress bar with 6 processing steps (Processando imagem, Detectando estruturas, Identificando cavidade, Analisando cor VITA, Avaliando substrato, Gerando diagnostico). Powered by Gemini 2.5 Pro. Cancel button available. Completed in ~45s. 0 JS errors during analysis.

wizard_steps_tested.name: DSD
wizard_steps_tested.notes: Full DSD simulation with before/after slider. 3 layer tabs (Restauracoes, Restauracoes+Clareamento, Tratamento Completo+Gengiva). View modes (Antes/Dividir/Depois). Gengivoplasty detection with accept/reject buttons. Proportion analysis with golden ratio, symmetry, midlines, smile line. Treatment suggestions for 6 teeth with detailed clinical descriptions. Auto-save indicator shows Salvo.

wizard_steps_tested.name: Revisao
wizard_steps_tested.notes: 4-tab interface (Dentes/Tratamento/Paciente/Resumo). Dental arch diagram with 32 tooth checkboxes. Treatment list with AI descriptions and combobox selectors. Tooth toggle works (checked/unchecked updates count). Patient name/DOB fields work. Clinical notes with voice recording. Gengivoplastia card shows DSD recommendation. Pontos de atencao with clinical warnings. Gerar Caso button triggers submission.

wizard_steps_tested.name: Resultado
wizard_steps_tested.notes: Case generation overlay with progress bar and 9-step list. System correctly retries failed AI calls (maxRetries: 2, baseDelay: 2000). After exhausting retries, moves to next tooth. Progress bar advances per tooth completion. Edge function failures (CLAUDE_408) handled gracefully without crash. Full completion not observed due to non-dental photo causing all AI calls to fail, but error handling is correct.

a11y_findings.step_announcer: PRESENT - sr-only aria-live region announces step changes
a11y_findings.keyboard_nav: Arrow keys disabled (correct - wizard contains form inputs)
a11y_findings.form_labels: All inputs properly labeled (Nome, Data nascimento, Anamnese)
a11y_findings.console_warning: Missing Description or aria- attribute in Dialog component (radix/shadcn)

insights: UX improvement: Show retry indicator during case generation when edge functions fail and retry. Currently no user feedback during retries.
Credit confirmation dialog works correctly - shows current balance, cost, and remaining credits.
Draft restore modal appears correctly when returning to wizard with saved state.
AI disclaimer modal with checkbox + Continuar flow works correctly.
Cookie consent dialog appears correctly with Apenas essenciais/Aceitar todos options.
Gengivoplasty auto-inclusion from DSD works - toast notification + protocol added to review.
Photo quality assessment shows Foto adequada para simulacao DSD immediately after upload.
Auto-save indicator (Salvando.../Salvo) appears from step 4 onwards.
recommendations: Show retry count/indicator on the progress overlay during case generation (e.g., Dente 11 - tentativa 2/3)
Add aria-describedby to AI disclaimer dialog to resolve console warning
Consider adding a global timeout for case generation (e.g., 10 min) with a graceful error state
Quick Case and Draft restore flows should be tested in a follow-up QA run with real dental photos
